steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content: The function is $f(x)=7x+2$. When $x=4$, replace $x$ with $4$: $$f(4)=7(4)+2.$$

steps.title: Evaluate
steps.content: $7(4)=28$, and $28+2=30$. Therefore, the value of $f(x)$ when $x=4$ is 30.

steps.title: Check the meaning
steps.content: The question asks for the output of the function at $x=4$, not the value of $x$. The output is $30$.
